brief: Escalating US-Iran conflict and UK leadership transition dominate headlines, while AI research and writing pedagogy studies feature in today's papers.
news_summary: US strikes continue after three service members killed in Iran conflict; Andy Burnham set to become UK PM as Keir Starmer resigns; India's Cockroach party protests and Congo Ebola outbreak also reported.
papers_summary: Research covers AI feedback in student writing, visualization literacy in VLMs, debris tracking in hypervelocity impacts, and developmental pathways of noun phrase complexity in L2 writing.

en.brief: Escalating US-Iran conflict and UK leadership transition dominate headlines, while AI research and writing pedagogy studies feature in today's papers.
en.news_summary: US strikes continue after three service members killed in Iran conflict; Andy Burnham set to become UK PM as Keir Starmer resigns; India's Cockroach party protests and Congo Ebola outbreak also reported.
en.papers_summary: Research covers AI feedback in student writing, visualization literacy in VLMs, debris tracking in hypervelocity impacts, and developmental pathways of noun phrase complexity in L2 writing.

zh.brief: 今日重點：中國外賣騎手獲頂級文學獎，鯊魚冷知識揭示自然界奇蹟，2026世界盃爭議不斷；國際方面美伊衝突升級，英國首相更迭。研究聚焦AI寫作反饋與可視化工具。
zh.news_summary: 中國外賣騎手王計兵憑藉日常工作的詩意創作獲文學獎，成為藍領作家代表人物；韓國流行音樂透過各種渠道滲入朝鮮，引發脫北者關注的現象。2026年世界盃因擴編、VAR及政治干預引發褒貶不一的討論。
zh.papers_summary: 一項研究顯示ChatGPT修改個人陳述時可能削弱原作者的強調意圖，另一項新工具「可視化自動補全」能根據數據推薦下一步圖表設計。

todays_image.caption: Like Lobophora sp. spreads across coral reefs, the war expands while the legal cases against protesters disintegrate like brittle seaweed.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
